\tzpentry{ID5966}{Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5966 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \\\\Delta P = P_{\\ ext{rear}} - P_{\\ ext{front}}, \\\\quad \\ ext{with} \\\\quad P_{\\ ext{electro}} = \\\\frac{1}{2}\\\\varepsilon_0 E^2 \\\\]
